evidence_summary: Reviewed the integrated round-292 worktree. The focused stringFromBool test proves stringFromBool true formats as "true" and stringFromBool false formats as "false" through source checking, run-program, backend LLVM/object validation, emit-native/native object validation, and linked native execution. Prelude, primitive inventory, run-program, and backend/native lowering agree on __string_from_bool. Primitive inventory, planned neighbor tracers, diff hygiene, evidence scans, docs scope audit, depfile, controller-state, and active-roadmap checks passed. The implementer-recorded broad build, full test, and thesis gate evidence is consistent with the inspected diff.
